title: Atomic dual-catalog inversion: logical catalog renders Codex-default hooks.json + explicit claude-hooks.json, manifests rerouted in one commit
action: Create one logical hook catalog with a renderer (hooks/catalog.mjs) that emits BOTH checked-in projections: hooks/hooks.json becomes the Codex default projection, hooks/claude-hooks.json carries the current Claude catalog; .claude-plugin/plugin.json switches its hooks path to claude-hooks.json IN THE SAME COMMIT as the inversion (P1 repair: no intermediate commit may leave Claude pointing at the Codex projection). Add a drift-check test: rendering the logical catalog reproduces both files byte-identically, plus an allowed-differences assertion (model-tier guard stays Claude-only per approach section 2). Codex-acceptance assertion (Safety-foundation exit, plan.md slice row): in an isolated CODEX_HOME fixture (no auth needed for marketplace/plugin verbs), run codex plugin marketplace add <repo-path> and codex plugin list --json and assert the bee plugin manifest is accepted and lists cleanly with the default hooks/hooks.json present; if the codex CLI is unavailable the row SKIPS loudly by name, never silently. Version-parity guard and publisher metadata are OUT of this cell — they belong to the Distribution slice (approach Likely Files item 3).

truths: rendering the logical catalog reproduces both checked-in projections byte-for-byte
Claude manifest points at claude-hooks.json in the same commit that inverts hooks.json
no wrapper .mjs file is forked per runtime
an isolated-CODEX_HOME row proves codex plugin marketplace add + plugin list --json accept the manifest with the default hooks/hooks.json route (loud SKIP when codex CLI absent)
the bare default harness mode still gates the full seven-wrapper table (cell-3 green target untouched); --catalog-only runs only catalog-drift + codex-acceptance rows

artifacts.substantive: logical catalog + deterministic renderer for both projections
explicit Claude projection, current Claude behavior preserved

prohibitions: no second marketplace or plugin copy
no union catalog with runtime-inert matchers
no intermediate commit repurposing hooks.json while Claude still consumes it

trace.outcome: Atomic dual-catalog inversion landed: hooks/catalog.mjs is the single logical hook catalog with a deterministic renderer; hooks/hooks.json is now the Codex default projection (model-tier guard omitted) and hooks/claude-hooks.json carries the byte-preserved Claude projection; .claude-plugin/plugin.json switched its hooks path to ./hooks/claude-hooks.json in the same commit (P1 atomicity). test_hook_contracts.mjs gained catalog-drift rows (both projections byte-identical to render, allowed-differences-only assertion: model-tier-guard-claude-only per approach.md section 2), an isolated-CODEX_HOME codex-acceptance group (live codex-cli 0.144.1: marketplace add accepted, bee@bee listed cleanly via plugin list --available --json, default hooks/hooks.json route proven; loud named SKIP when CLI absent), and an opt-in --catalog-only verify mode; bare default mode still gates the full seven-wrapper table (exits 1 with the 16 inherited RED rows, cell-3's green target) and --baseline is byte-for-byte unchanged in behavior. No wrapper .mjs forked or edited; version-parity/publisher metadata left to the Distribution slice. Decisions D1, D2.

First run of the new drift rows against the OLD single-file layout would fail: claude-hooks.json missing entirely.",
  "verification_run": "node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs --catalog-only && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs -> --catalog-only: 6 rows (0 skipped), 0 failing, ALL PASS (incl. live codex-cli 0.144.1 acceptance: marketplace \"bee\" accepted, plugin bee@bee listed); test_lib: 169 passed, 0 failed. Mode-preservation proofs: bare default mode exits 1 with exactly the 16 inherited wrapper RED rows (62 rows across 9 groups — cell-3's green target untouched); --baseline exits 0 and regenerates red-baseline.md with the same 16 findings (only timestamp/tmpdir names differ; file restored via git checkout).",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["The 16 wrapper RED rows remain red by design — repairing the wrappers is cell codex-parity-3's scope (this cell's constraints forbid any wrapper .mjs logic change).", "Live Codex plugin-hook FIRING (trust + fresh thread) is a named Distribution-slice human checkpoint per validation-safety-foundation.md row 1 — this cell proves manifest acceptance and the default hooks path only."]
}
